diff_user.system:
You are an expert data engineer specializing in converting data to text. You will be given the current Python program with its BLUE score and an inspiration program and your task will be to evolve the current Python program to improve the score. It is a program that converts a list of triples into natural language text. The given triples will be associated with the topic: Airport. The program must implement a function called 'predict' that accepts a list of triples and generates a coherent, contextually relevant sentence that accurately represents the information contained in the triples. Ensure that the generated text is fluent, grammatically correct, and maintains the meaning of the original data. There can be multiple triples given that make up a complex sentence. Converting all those triples into one sentence will award greater score. An example of a complex sentence:
Triples:
(Antwerp | cityServed | Antwerp International Airport)
(Belgium | country | Antwerp)
(City of Brussels | capital | Belgium)
Example sentence:
"Antwerp International Airport serves the city of Antwerp which is in Belgium, where the capital is Brussels."

The 'predict' function returns that sentence as a string. Below is the list of all possible predicates that can be given as an input. With the given predicates and example triples implement the 'predict' function so it can process all the possible predicates:

Predicate: cityServed - Example triple: (Aarhus Airport | cityServed | "Aarhus, Denmark")
Predicate: elevationAboveTheSeaLevel - Example triple: (Aarhus Airport | elevationAboveTheSeaLevel | 25.0)
Predicate: location - Example triple: (Aarhus Airport | location | Tirstrup)

Predicate: isPartOf - Example triple: (Abilene, Texas | isPartOf | Jones County, Texas)
Predicate: 1stRunwayLengthFeet - Example triple: (Abilene Regional Airport | 1stRunwayLengthFeet | 3678)

Predicate: 3rdRunwayLengthFeet - Example triple: (Abilene Regional Airport | 3rdRunwayLengthFeet | 7202)

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    subject_map = {}
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_map:
            subject_map[triple.subject] = []
        subject_map[triple.subject].append((triple.predicate, triple.object))

    sentence = ""
    main_subjects = []
    for subject, triples in subject_map.items():
        if subject not in main_subjects:
            main_subjects.append(subject)
            if sentence:
                sentence += " and "
            sentence += f"{subject} "
            city_served = None
            location = None
            elevation = None
            runway_length = None
            country = None
            operating_organisation = None
            for i, (predicate, obj) in enumerate(triples):
                if predicate == "cityServed":
                    city_served = obj
                elif predicate == "location":
                    location = obj
                elif predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
                    elevation = obj
                elif predicate == "runwayLength":
                    runway_length = obj
                elif predicate == "country":
                    country = obj
                elif predicate == "operatingOrganisation":
                    operating_organisation = obj
            if city_served and location and elevation and runway_length and operating_organisation:
                sentence += f"serves the city of {city_served} which is located in {location} at an elevation of {elevation} metres above sea level, has a runway length of {runway_length} metres and is operated by {operating_organisation}"
            elif city_served and location and elevation:
                sentence += f"serves the city of {city_served} which is located in {location} at an elevation of {elevation} metres above sea level"
            elif location and elevation and country:
                sentence += f"is located in {location} which is in {country} at an elevation of {elevation} metres above sea level"
            elif location and country:
                sentence += f"is located in {location} which is in {country}"
            else:
                for i, (predicate, obj) in enumerate(triples):
                    if predicate == "cityServed":
                        sentence += f"serves the city of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "mayor":
                        sentence += f"where the mayor is {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "isPartOf":
                        sentence += f"is part of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "operatingOrganisation":
                        sentence += f"is operated by {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "location":
                        sentence += f"is located in {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
                        sentence += f"has an elevation of {obj} metres above sea level"
                    elif predicate == "runwayLength":
                        sentence += f"has a runway length of {obj} metres"
                    elif predicate == "country":
                        sentence += f"is located in {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "capital":
                        sentence += f"has a capital of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "language":
                        sentence += f"speaks {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "leader":
                        sentence += f"has a leader of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "owner":
                        sentence += f"is owned by {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "1stRunwayLengthFeet":
                        sentence += f"has a first runway length of {obj} feet"
                    elif predicate == "1stRunwaySurfaceType":
                        sentence += f"has a first runway surface type of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "3rdRunwayLengthFeet":
                        sentence += f"has a third runway length of {obj} feet"
                    elif predicate == "icaoLocationIdentifier":
                        sentence += f"has an ICAO location identifier of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "locationIdentifier":
                        sentence += f"has a location identifier of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
                        sentence += f"has an elevation of {obj} feet above sea level"
                    elif predicate == "iataLocationIdentifier":
                        sentence += f"has an IATA location identifier of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "nativeName":
                        sentence += f"has a native name of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "leaderParty":
                        sentence += f"has a leader party of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "isPartOf":
                        sentence += f"is a part of {obj}"
                    elif predicate == "capital":
                        sentence += f"has {obj} as its capital"
                    else:
                        sentence += f"has a {predicate} of {obj}"
                    if i < len(triples) - 1:
                        sentence += ", "
            if sentence.endswith(", "):
                sentence = sentence[:-2]
    return sentence + "."
=======
def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    subject_map = {}
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_map:
            subject_map[triple.subject] = []
        subject_map[triple.subject].append((triple.predicate, triple.object))

    sentence = ""
    for subject, triples in subject_map.items():
        if sentence:
            sentence += " which "
        else:
            sentence += f"{subject} "

        predicates = []
        for i, (predicate, obj) in enumerate(triples):
            if predicate == "cityServed":
                predicates.append(f"serves the city of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "mayor":
                predicates.append(f"has a mayor of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "isPartOf":
                predicates.append(f"is part of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "operatingOrganisation":
                predicates.append(f"is operated by {obj}")
            elif predicate == "location":
                predicates.append(f"is located in {obj}")
            elif predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
                predicates.append(f"is {obj} metres above sea level")
            elif predicate == "runwayLength":
                predicates.append(f"has a runway length of {obj} metres")
            elif predicate == "country":
                predicates.append(f"is located in {obj}")
            elif predicate == "capital":
                predicates.append(f"has {obj} as its capital")
            elif predicate == "language":
                predicates.append(f"has {obj} as its official language")
            elif predicate == "leader":
                predicates.append(f"has {obj} as its leader")
            elif predicate == "owner":
                predicates.append(f"is owned by {obj}")
            elif predicate == "1stRunwayLengthFeet":
                predicates.append(f"has a first runway length of {obj} feet")
            elif predicate == "1stRunwaySurfaceType":
                predicates.append(f"has a first runway with {obj} surface")
            elif predicate == "3rdRunwayLengthFeet":
                predicates.append(f"has a third runway length of {obj} feet")
            elif predicate == "icaoLocationIdentifier":
                predicates.append(f"has an ICAO location identifier of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "locationIdentifier":
                predicates.append(f"has a location identifier of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
                predicates.append(f"is {obj} feet above sea level")
            elif predicate == "iataLocationIdentifier":
                predicates.append(f"has an IATA location identifier of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "nativeName":
                predicates.append(f"has a native name of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "leaderParty":
                predicates.append(f"has a leader party of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "runwayName":
                predicates.append(f"has a runway named {obj}")
            elif predicate == "runwaySurfaceType":
                predicates.append(f"has a runway surface type of {obj}")
            elif predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres":
                predicates.append(f"is {obj} metres above sea level")
            elif predicate == "runwayLength":
                predicates.append(f"has a runway length of {obj} metres")
            else:
                predicates.append(f"has a {predicate} of {obj}")

        if predicates:
            location_predicates = []
            other_predicates = []
            for p in predicates:
                if any(phrase in p for phrase in ["is located in", "is part of", "serves the city of", "is operated by", "has as its capital", "has as its official language", "has as its leader"]):
                    location_predicates.append(p)
                else:
                    other_predicates.append(p)

            all_predicates = location_predicates + other_predicates
            if len(all_predicates) > 1:
                sentence += ", ".join(all_predicates[:-1]) + " and " + all_predicates[-1]
            else:
                sentence += all_predicates[0]

    return sentence + "."
